test_cases.title: Cuff Inflation to Initial Target
test_cases.rationale: Verify cuff inflates to initial target of 180 mmHg on measurement start

test_cases.title: Cuff Inflation Beyond Initial Target
test_cases.rationale: Verify cuff inflates in 40 mmHg increments up to 299 mmHg if pulse not detected
preconditions: User's pulse is not detectable at 180 mmHg
steps: Ensure pulse is not detected by device at 180 mmHg
test_cases.expected_result: Cuff inflates to 299 mmHg in 40 mmHg increments

test_cases.title: Cuff Deflation
test_cases.rationale: Verify cuff deflates in controlled steps of approximately 3 mmHg
steps: Allow device to start deflation after inflation
test_cases.expected_result: Cuff deflates in steps of approximately 3 mmHg
